content: We can adapt the ACP harness agent runtime execution model to orchestrate dynamic LightRAG knowledge graph retrieval workflows, where each entity and relation subgraph acts as a lightweight harness agent that inherits the runtime's native parallel execution and failure rollback semantics. When complex multi-hop retrieval hits a dead-end relation path, the runtime can automatically trigger a rollback to a previous valid entity branch and spawn alternative retrieval paths in parallel, cutting down on wasted compute and improving retrieval accuracy.
source_topics: ACP harness agent runtime execution model
trigger_topic: ACP harness agent runtime execution model
